name: Lady Baltimore Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a large bowl, stirring until well blended.
2. Stir in the pecans, coconut, chopped cherries, and flavorings.
3. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the mixture into each tart shell.
4. Bake at 300°F for 40 minutes or until the tarts are set.
5. Garnish with sliced cherries if desired.
